feature.label: RAAML Picto Studio
feature.provider-name: KIT DSIS – Karlsruhe Institute of Technology
feature.description:
RAAML Picto Studio is a model-driven safety analysis workbench built on Eclipse Epsilon and Picto. It provides live, interactive HTML visualizations for ISO 26262 safety analyses — including FMEA, FTA, HARA, STPA, GSN, HAZOP and Requirements — using the RAAML (Risk Analysis and Assessment Modelling Language) metamodel.
Key features: - RAAML metamodel with sub-packages for FMEA, FTA, HARA, STPA, GSN, REQ, and Library - Live Picto visualizations rendered from EGL/EGX transformation templates - Form-based FMEA editor for user-friendly entry of failure modes and RPN values - Pre-modelled AEB (Autonomous Emergency Braking) case study instance models - ISO 26262:2018 and AIAG FMEA-4 compliant RPN methodology - Automated EGL/EGX template synthesis via higher-order model-to-text transformation
Update Site: https://masimminhas.github.io/raaml-picto-studio/ Source Code: https://github.com/masimminhas/raaml-picto-studio
feature.copyright:
